channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ottawa and surrounding areas to experience mild spring temperatures over the weekend
item.description: Ottawa and surrounding regions are expected to enjoy mild spring weather throughout the upcoming weekend. Temperatures are forecasted to remain moderate, providing a break from earlier cooler conditio...

item.title: Justice Wanjiru Karanja takes over as Acting Court of Appeal President pending June election
item.description: Chief Justice Martha Koome has appointed Justice Wanjiru Karanja as the Acting President of the Court of Appeal following the end of Justice Daniel Musinga’s five-year term on May 24, 2026. Justice Mu...

item.title: APM governorship candidate promises inclusive and transparent governance in Ogun State
item.description: The governorship candidate of the Allied Peoples Movement (APM) in Ogun State, Rotimi Babajide, has pledged to run an inclusive, transparent and people-focused administration if elected in the 2027 el...

item.title: EACC arrests two police officers in Kisii over alleged Sh40,000 bribery linked to land dispute case
item.description: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission (EACC) has arrested two senior police officers in Kisii County over allegations of soliciting and receiving a bribe from a member of the public in relation to...

item.title: Delhi Court Charges Sukesh Chandrasekhar and Jacqueline Fernandez in ₹200 Crore Extortion Case
item.description: On Saturday, a Delhi court formally framed money laundering charges against alleged conman Sukesh Chandrasekhar along with eight others, including Bollywood actress Jacqueline Fernandez, in connection...

item.title: White House health memo on President Trump highlights weight increase and BMI concerns
item.description: A recent White House medical memo detailing President Donald Trump’s latest visit to Walter Reed National Military Medical Center has sparked public discussion, particularly regarding changes in his p...

item.title: Mumbai Sees Second CNG Price Hike in Two Weeks Amid Rising Fuel Costs
item.description: In Mumbai and surrounding regions like Thane and Navi Mumbai, the price of Compressed Natural Gas (CNG) has been increased by Rs 2 per kilogram, effective from midnight on Saturday. This is the second...

item.title: Phyna says she plans to have first child through surrogacy after financial preparation
item.description: Reality TV star and Big Brother Naija Season 7 winner, Phyna Otabor, has opened up about her plans to become a mother, saying she is targeting the next few months and early next year to start her jour...

item.title: Harambee Stars to Face Lesotho in June Friendlies as Kyrgyzstan and Pakistan Matches Cancelled
item.description: Kenya’s national football team, Harambee Stars, has confirmed changes in its upcoming international friendly matches as part of its preparations for the 2026 Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) and ongoing ...

item.title: Tanzania supports blended finance approach to strengthen aviation and health infrastructure in Africa
item.description: Tanzania has expressed strong support for blended finance models as a way of addressing Africa’s growing infrastructure needs, particularly in the aviation and health sectors. The position was present...

item.title: Hoons damage multiple Canberra sportsgrounds over two nights, prompting safety concerns
item.description: Repeated acts of vandalism by hoons have caused significant damage to several sportsgrounds in Canberra over a two-night period, disrupting local sporting fixtures and placing additional pressure on v...

item.title: Suspected reprisal bandit attack leaves about 16 dead in Katsina village
item.description: At least 16 people are feared dead after armed bandits launched a deadly attack on Kiliya village near Bagagadi in Dutsinma Local Government Area of Katsina State. The incident happened shortly after ...

item.title: Niger Delta Navy Opens Eight New Flats for Officers in Calabar
item.description: The Nigerian Navy don inaugurate eight two-bedroom flats for officers at Ikot Ansa Senior Staff Quarters, Calabar, as part of their plan to take care of personnel welfare and improve operational readi...

item.title: Jimmy McDonough Chronicles the Turbulent Life of Gary Stewart
item.description: Jimmy McDonough’s new biography, Gary Stewart: I Am From the Honky-Tonks, delves into the chaotic and self-destructive life of country musician Gary Stewart, whose 1975 hit 'She’s Actin’ Single (I’m D...

item.title: Kenyan Woman Returns Home Safely After Spending One Year Detained in Lebanon
item.description: Vicoty Cheruto, a young woman from Milimani area in Ziwa Soy Constituency, Uasin Gishu County, has finally returned home after enduring a tough year abroad. She travelled to Beirut, Lebanon in 2024 se...

item.title: DepEd projects up to 28 million learners for SY 2026-2027 amid classroom and teacher resource planning
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) is projecting that enrollment for School Year (SY) 2026–2027 could reach between 26 million and 28 million students nationwide. The school year is set to begin on J...

item.title: SpaceX Secures $6.45 Billion in Space Force Contracts Prior to Planned IPO
item.description: SpaceX has received two major contracts from the U.S. Space Force totaling $6.45 billion, providing a significant boost as the company prepares for what is expected to be the largest IPO ever next mon...

item.title: Tanzanian Fintech NALA raises $50M to expand cross-border payment services
item.description: Dar es Salaam – Tanzanian fintech company NALA, founded by entrepreneur Benjamin Fernandes, has successfully secured $50 million in credit financing to support its global expansion plans. The funding ...

item.title: Zanzibar to introduce digital taxi meters and standardised fare system to improve transport services
item.description: Zanzibar is moving ahead with plans to modernise its taxi sector through the introduction of a digital fare payment and metering system aimed at improving transparency, efficiency, and service deliver...

item.title: Raheem Sterling arrested on suspicion of drug driving following M3 crash
item.description: Former England footballer Raheem Sterling, aged 31, was arrested on suspicion of drug driving after crashing his Lamborghini into the barriers on the southbound M3 near the Minley Interchange shortly ...
